descriptionText: If you are searching for a reliable sailing yacht, the Dehler 42 DS For Sale 1995 is a solid choice that stands out. This particular vessel, built in 1995, combines the robust design Dehler is known for with practical features and good overall condition. She is currently located at the Aktio Marina shipyard in Preveza, Greece.The Dehler 42, represents a well-maintained yacht suitable for both cruising and racing enthusiasts who appreciate a yacht with a decent track record and modern upgrades. This boat has been cared for in a way that ensures her seaworthiness and comfortable live-aboard capabilities.Here are the key specifications and equipment included with this Dehler 42 1995:Builder: DehlerModel: 42 DSYear: 1995Hull Material: Fibreglass (VTR with polyester resin)Length Overall: 12.45 metersBeam (Width): 3.90 metersDraft: 1.95 metersFlag: PolishThe boat is also equipped with a well thought out list of accessories and upgrades aimed at improving both performance and comfort:New autopilot system, enhancing ease of navigationNew refrigerator, providing modern conveniences for extended tripsNew bow thruster, aiding in manoeuvring and dock handlingNew battery charger to maintain reliable power supplyOn-board heating system for cooler weather comfortSolar panels for sustainable, off-grid energy useElectric winches for sails, reducing the effort required for sail adjustmentsSelf-tacking headsail (jib), simplifying handling especially for short-handed crewsFully battened mainsail for better sail shape and performanceShaft line with three-blade folding propeller, adjustable pitch on land, improving propulsion efficiencyDepth sounder and various navigation accessories includedGennaker with roller furling for downwind sailingLarge fuel/water tanks capacity totalling 500 litresTwo gel batteries, 200 Amp each, supporting the electrical systemNew tender with aluminium keel and small Suzuki 2.5 hp outboard engine for easy shore access2 cabins version with a convertible saloon.Overall, this Dehler 42 1995 remains in good condition. Over the years, it has been maintained with care and several recent upgrades have been made to keep her practical and ready to sail. She represents a good balance of traditional yacht craftsmanship and functional modern updates, making her a sound option for anyone looking for a cruising yacht or performance cruiser in this size and price range.For more details or to arrange a viewing of this Dehler 42 1995, don't hesitate to contact us!
descriptionHtml:
If you are searching for a reliable sailing yacht, the Dehler 42 DS For Sale 1995 is a solid choice that stands out. This particular vessel, built in 1995, combines the robust design Dehler is known for with practical features and good overall condition. She is currently located at the Aktio Marina shipyard in Preveza, Greece.

The Dehler 42, represents a well-maintained yacht suitable for both cruising and racing enthusiasts who appreciate a yacht with a decent track record and modern upgrades. This boat has been cared for in a way that ensures her seaworthiness and comfortable live-aboard capabilities.

Here are the key specifications and equipment included with this Dehler 42  1995:

  • Builder: Dehler
  • Model: 42 DS
  • Year: 1995
  • Hull Material: Fibreglass (VTR with polyester resin)
  • Length Overall: 12.45 meters
  • Beam (Width): 3.90 meters
  • Draft: 1.95 meters
  • Flag: Polish

The boat is also equipped with a well thought out list of accessories and upgrades aimed at improving both performance and comfort:

  • New autopilot system, enhancing ease of navigation
  • New refrigerator, providing modern conveniences for extended trips
  • New bow thruster, aiding in manoeuvring and dock handling
  • New battery charger to maintain reliable power supply
  • On-board heating system for cooler weather comfort
  • Solar panels for sustainable, off-grid energy use
  • Electric winches for sails, reducing the effort required for sail adjustments
  • Self-tacking headsail (jib), simplifying handling especially for short-handed crews
  • Fully battened mainsail for better sail shape and performance
  • Shaft line with three-blade folding propeller, adjustable pitch on land, improving propulsion efficiency
  • Depth sounder and various navigation accessories included
  • Gennaker with roller furling for downwind sailing
  • Large fuel/water tanks capacity totalling 500 litres
  • Two gel batteries, 200 Amp each, supporting the electrical system
  • New tender with aluminium keel and small Suzuki 2.5 hp outboard engine for easy shore access
  • 2 cabins version with a convertible saloon.

Overall, this Dehler 42 1995 remains in good condition. Over the years, it has been maintained with care and several recent upgrades have been made to keep her practical and ready to sail. She represents a good balance of traditional yacht craftsmanship and functional modern updates, making her a sound option for anyone looking for a cruising yacht or performance cruiser in this size and price range.

For more details or to arrange a viewing of this Dehler 42 1995, don't hesitate to contact us!
